reviews.review_msg: Ann is possibly the best professor I have ever had. She is extremely knowledgeable in her field and that makes her lectures so interesting. She teaches in a way that makes you critically engage with the material and perhaps see things in a new light. It is very difficult to get an A in her classes, but what you gain from the course is much greater.
An engaging and intriguing prof. Ann really keeps it real and is good at relating to students while remaining professional. And her dog is really cute!
Good prof...disciplined, effective, organized, punctual, REALLY GOOD

Awesome teacher. I couldn't possibly recommend him more. Especially if you're into creative writing. He gives great advice on how to improve your writing and different things to consider in your own writing.

To say the least, David makes you identify with the material -- it's like you're bound to feel it somewhere in your past history, or present. But once you're there, you discover that post-colonial life is one big pile of complicated, diabolical #### and david is the symbol of this mess. Otherwise, he marks fairly if you parrot the secondary sources
Strongly political, very closed minded to things that don't fit his dogmatic, ultra-left view of the world.
Not exactly unfair, just very specific about his writing-style preferences.  Good prof.
smart, helpful, questions but doesn't shoot you down, but phases in and out

Very passionate and well-informed professor on her research subject, but in-class she is unprepared to take on her own course load.  Her level of intellectual thought would be better suited for grad students, not undergrads...also a space monkey...
